examples: It's rude to answer back to your parents.
Don't answer back when your teacher is speaking.
He always answers back when criticized.
The child was punished for answering back.
example_translate: Он всегда огрызается, когда его критикуют.
answer back.synonyms: Огрызаться, отвечать дерзко - talk back, retort, reply rudely
